change_summary: Moved Validator-B prompt payload to stdin to avoid Windows command-line length limits.
Restricted Validator-B sandbox label to read-only and enabled Gemini CLI sandboxing with its boolean --sandbox flag.
Added total embedded context budget and stronger independence checks.
Added validator-result schema contract to the Validator-B prompt.
Added Validator-A required-field parity and globbed Validator-B fixture validation.
self_review: Dry-run should no longer place the full prompt in argv.
Live Gemini smoke still requires Gemini CLI installation and authentication.

log.result: Synthetic Generator result for Validator-B hardening validation.
